examples: With boisterous mirth they dropped upon their knees in a body and did mock homage to their prey.
The performance produced much mirth among the audience.
That caused considerable mirth among students and coaches alike.
She finds herself flushing with a combination of rage and an almost reckless mirth.
Kate merrily greets all of Sir Harry's boastful claims of success with barely concealed mirth and impertinence.
